headline: Kala Bio Launches a Revolution for Biotech- First AI Agent Deploying in 14 Days as $180 Billion Agentic AI Healthcare Revolution Accelerates
summary: Platform Rebrand of Researgency.ai; First Purpose-Built AI Agent for Biotech Expected to Ship Within Two WeeksARLINGTON, Mass., March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- KALA BIO, Inc. (NASDAQ: KALA) announces that it is ready to ship its first commercial AI product in approximately 14 days, transforming the Company from a clinical-stage biotech into a dual-engine growth story powered by both a proprietary drug pipeline and a scalable AI platform targeting the $180+ billion AI-in-healthcare market. headline: Block’s Cash App Bets On Stablecoins And AI Reshaping Investor Narrative
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) is adding stablecoin support to Cash App, reflecting a shift in its stance on digital assets. The company is introducing Moneybot, an AI powered payments assistant that sits inside core Cash App payment flows. These moves follow large scale AI driven restructuring and job cuts, and mark a new phase focused on product direction rather than workforce changes. At a share price of $65.6, Block sits in a part of the market where investors often watch product updates closely. The...
